content.en:
"It's done!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

The Black Mist Worm clone has been staying in the Primordial Sea, who can have such treatment?

Suddenly.

Ye Tian thought of a problem, that is, if the black fog insect clone was too weak, it would be useless in the primordial sea.

Moreover, once the origin tide of the primordial sea was over, he would not be able to enter here, and the black mist worm would not be able to leave, and he would not be able to obtain too many benefits.

The only thing he gained was that he copied a large number of Eternal Ancestral Endowments.

Now, he is faced with two choices.

The first choice is to continue to stay here, and not wait to go out and then fuse the Eternal Ancestral Fu, just start fusing right here.

The second option is to wait until you go out and then fuse these eternal ancestral endowments, and seize the time to find resources and treasures by yourself.

After thinking for a while, Ye Tian decided to choose the first one.

He is going to fuse right here, fuse the talent above the Eternal Ancestor as quickly as possible, and then give it to the Black Mist Worm clone, so that the Black Mist Worm Clone will rise completely and become the king of the Black Mist Bug.

In that case, the Black Mist Worm clone would be able to have an overlord in the Primordial Sea, and naturally it would be able to collect more good things, and the next time it came in, it would be able to harvest countless resources.

Moreover, he was also very curious, what was the talent above the Eternal Ancestor?

"Start merging!"

Ye Tian arranged a time acceleration array around him, starting with devouring the Eternal Ancestral Fu.

One door devoured the Eternal Ancestral Fu and fused, but the speed of fusion was relatively slow, and even a little difficult, after all, the grade of the copying talent was not much higher than the Eternal Ancestral Fu, so it was naturally very difficult to fuse the Eternal Ancestral Fu.

But in the end, a gate devouring the Eternal Ancestral Fu still fused together.

Duration.

There were supreme beings passing by here, but Ye Tian hid his figure, and as soon as these supreme beings sensed the black fog on the island, they were so frightened that they immediately fled, and they didn't dare to investigate it carefully.

Therefore, Ye Tian has not been discovered so far.

Time passes slowly –

Ye Tian didn't know how long it had passed, but he had been in the Time Acceleration Great Array for a long time, and he had also fused a lot of Eternal Ancestral Fu.

Gradually, the power of Devouring Eternal Ancestor Fu after fusion became more and more powerful, as if it would lead to qualitative changes at any time.

Finally, on this day, the Devouring Eternal Ancestral Fu was completely transformed.

Devour: Immortal Ancestral Endowment

This was a talent level above the Eternal Ancestral Endowment, and it was also the first Immortal Ancestral Endowment that Ye Tian possessed.

The Immortal Ancestral Endowment was almost completely at the same level as the Replication Talent, and Ye Tian also clearly sensed that the Immortal Ancestral Endowment could no longer be upgraded, at least the current Replication Talent could no longer be fused with the Immortal Ancestral Endowment.

Immediately.

Ye Tian deprived the Immortal Ancestor Endowment to the Black Fog Worm clone, so that the Black Fog Worm clone also had the Immortal Ancestral Endowment.

In the following days, Ye Tian fused the other Eternal Ancestral Endowments one by one.

In this way, the Power Immortal Ancestor, the Defense Immortal Ancestor, the Speed Immortal Ancestor, and the Immortal Immortal Ancestor were born one by one, and they were all given to the Black Mist Worm clone by Ye Tian.

Gathering these immortal ancestral endowments, the black fog worm clone finally underwent a qualitative change.

Bang!!!!!

The black fog worm clone ushered in a metamorphosis, not only did its size begin to skyrocket, but its strength also soared rapidly, as if it had broken some kind of boundary.

After all, in the Primordial Sea, the Black Mist Worm was subject to some kind of restriction, if it was in the outside world, it would be impossible for such a small creature with strength to threaten the Ninefold Supreme, but the Primordial Sea existed, and it must be the rules of the Primordial Sea that restricted the Black Mist Worm.

And now, Ye Tian has broken this restriction.

In a short time, the size of the black fog insect was comparable to the size of a black beetle, and it was too conspicuous among the countless black fog insects.

Moreover, Ye Tian clearly felt that the Black Mist Worm clone could dominate other Black Mist Worms, just like a king.

In terms of cultivation realm, the Black Mist Worm clone is roughly equivalent to the Sixfold Supreme One, which can lead countless Black Mist Worms, and its threat power is comparable to the powerful half-step Eternal Realm.

Moreover, the Black Mist Worm clone is able to leave the island and is no longer restricted.

Soon after.

Ye Tian found that the origin tide was almost over.

"It's time to leave, otherwise this replica body won't be able to go back, and those talents won't be taken with us. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Wow!

He flew into the Void and left the Primordial Sea along the Origin Tide.

Soon after.

Ye Tian returned to the Source Sea, and then carefully tried to sense the location of the Primordial Sea, but he could sense it but couldn't enter it.

This time, Ye Tian's harvest was not very large, and it was definitely not comparable to those half-step Eternal Realms, but he had obtained some immortal ancestral endowments, and this was the biggest gain.

Ye Tian took a look, and the Twelve Ancestors and the other Supreme Beings of the Source God Pavilion also came out.

Soon, the Supreme One of the Source God Pavilion returned to the Source God Pavilion.

An internal meeting of Genjin Pavilion.

One Supreme One Beings sat in their place, and Ye Tian was also here.

But soon, he discovered that many Supreme Beings had not returned.

Time passes slowly until the source tide disappears completely.

At the same time, Ye Tian's Black Fog Worm clone found that the restrictions of the Primordial Sea had completely disappeared, and countless Black Mist Worms flew out and spread all over the Primordial Sea.

......

"The rest of the Supreme Beings have not returned, and even if they are still alive, they will inevitably be swallowed by the black mist at this moment. "

"This time, our Origin God Pavilion has fallen thirty-seven members of the Inner Circle!"

The True River Sword Ancestor announced.

Thirty-seven members of the Inner Circle, and these supreme beings who have fallen are at least in the Eightfold Heaven Realm.

The Eight Heavenly Supremes, what a powerful realm this is, and it has fallen so much at once.

"Let's start trading!"

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor spoke.

The other Supreme Beings immediately took out the resources they didn't need and wanted to exchange them for resources with other Supreme Beings.

And Ye Tian also took out some resources, mainly to exchange them for the resources he needed that could help the growth of the Eternal Body.

He wanted to elevate his Endless Eternity to the realm of perfection, so he needed a lot of resources.

Many of the Supreme Beings' Eternal Tribulation Bodies or Eternal Divine Bodies or Eternal Bodies here have reached the Perfection Realm, so even if they obtain a treasure similar to the Yuanqing Eternal Stone, they are not very needed, so they are willing to exchange them for other resources.

Soon, Ye Tian traded a lot of resources similar to Yuanqing Eternal Stone.

Soon after, the deal was completed, and one by one the Supreme Beings left the place and went back to retreat.

And Ye Tian couldn't wait to return to the Void Source Hall and disappear in the Source God Pavilion.
